summary: The diff implements all four requirements. A new MindfulnessGuide.tsx component is created under frontend/src/components/ encapsulating the guide container, title, step content, MeditationGuideStepper, More Details navigation (via useNavigate), and Previous/Next step state management. PreMeditationPage is updated to import and render <MindfulnessGuide> with a meditationType prop, replacing the previously inline guide markup and state.
